DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
DEFENDANT TWITTER, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg
